news.title:
CLSA notes Middle East war impacts stocks like ONGC, Oil India, Reliance, and OMCs differently.
Post-war, upstream firms like ONGC may gain, while OMCs face margin pressure if crude stays elevated.
news.summary:
CLSA notes Middle East war impacts stocks like ONGC, Oil India, Reliance, and OMCs differently.
Post-war, upstream firms like ONGC may gain, while OMCs face margin pressure if crude stays elevated.

news.title:
India commissions 8,000 TPA green hydrogen capacity till Feb 2026.
Govt targets 5 MMT green hydrogen annually by 2030 under NGHM.
news.summary:
India commissions 8,000 TPA green hydrogen capacity till Feb 2026.
Govt targets 5 MMT green hydrogen annually by 2030 under NGHM.

news.title:
India resumes Iranian LPG imports after U.S. eases sanctions, ending years-long halt.
Indian Oil, HPCL, and BPCL may benefit as Iran's energy trade reopens.
news.summary:
India resumes Iranian LPG imports after U.S. eases sanctions, ending years-long halt.
Indian Oil, HPCL, and BPCL may benefit as Iran's energy trade reopens.

news.title:
State-run oil firms assure no shortage of petrol, diesel, or LPG despite panic buying.
Consumers urged to avoid panic buying as long queues seen at fuel stations in cities.
news.summary:
State-run oil firms assure no shortage of petrol, diesel, or LPG despite panic buying.
Consumers urged to avoid panic buying as long queues seen at fuel stations in cities.

news.title:
OMCs like BPCL, HPCL, and IOC may report Q4 profits despite negative petrol/diesel margins.
Auto fuel/LPG under-recoveries could reach Rs 35,000-50,000 crore/month; windfall taxes may cover Rs 9,000-18,000 crore.
news.summary:
OMCs like BPCL, HPCL, and IOC may report Q4 profits despite negative petrol/diesel margins.
Auto fuel/LPG under-recoveries could reach Rs 35,000-50,000 crore/month; windfall taxes may cover Rs 9,000-18,000 crore.

news.title:
The 2026 Iran war impacted Indian stocks, with L&T, IndiGo, and HPCL facing declines due to disrupted oil supply, trade routes, and investor outflows.
L&T lost 20% over Middle East exposure risks, IndiGo dropped 16% from flight cancellations and fuel costs, while HPCL fell 25% amid crude price spikes.
news.summary:
The 2026 Iran war impacted Indian stocks, with L&T, IndiGo, and HPCL facing declines due to disrupted oil supply, trade routes, and investor outflows.
L&T lost 20% over Middle East exposure risks, IndiGo dropped 16% from flight cancellations and fuel costs, while HPCL fell 25% amid crude price spikes.

news.title:
Crude oil prices dropped 10.1% to $96.06 after Trump paused Iran strikes; later rebounded to $101.
BPCL, HPCL, IOCL, RIL, and Petronet LNG secure LPG and crude shipments amid Hormuz tensions.
news.summary:
Crude oil prices dropped 10.1% to $96.06 after Trump paused Iran strikes; later rebounded to $101.
BPCL, HPCL, IOCL, RIL, and Petronet LNG secure LPG and crude shipments amid Hormuz tensions.

news.title:
West Asia conflict pushes OMCs, including Hindustan Petroleum, to expand LPG storage facilities.
LPG, being highly impacted by the conflict, drives aggressive storage site initiatives.
news.summary:
West Asia conflict pushes OMCs, including Hindustan Petroleum, to expand LPG storage facilities.
LPG, being highly impacted by the conflict, drives aggressive storage site initiatives.

news.title:
Oil marketing stocks HPCL, BPCL, and Indian Oil plunged 25-30% due to the US-Iran war, with valuations below 5-year averages.
Gas stocks like Petronet LNG, GAIL, IGL, MGL, and Gujarat Gas dropped 11-27%, while ONGC and Oil India fell 3-4% but stayed above 5-year averages.
news.summary:
Oil marketing stocks HPCL, BPCL, and Indian Oil plunged 25-30% due to the US-Iran war, with valuations below 5-year averages.
Gas stocks like Petronet LNG, GAIL, IGL, MGL, and Gujarat Gas dropped 11-27%, while ONGC and Oil India fell 3-4% but stayed above 5-year averages.

news.title:
Indian refiners to buy Iranian crude post-US waiver, as per refinery executives.
US grants 30-day waiver for oil loaded by March 20, says OFAC order.
news.summary:
Indian refiners to buy Iranian crude post-US waiver, as per refinery executives.
US grants 30-day waiver for oil loaded by March 20, says OFAC order.

news.title:
OMCs capped auto LPG refuelling at 10 litres/vehicle in Kolkata after steep price hike.
Auto LPG demand surged fivefold over the past week, leading to rationing at dispensing stations.
news.summary:
OMCs capped auto LPG refuelling at 10 litres/vehicle in Kolkata after steep price hike.
Auto LPG demand surged fivefold over the past week, leading to rationing at dispensing stations.

news.title:
HPCL buys 2M barrels of Angolan oil amid Middle East crisis, diversifying sources.
India shifts from Middle Eastern oil due to high prices, with IOC seeking West African crude.
news.summary:
HPCL buys 2M barrels of Angolan oil amid Middle East crisis, diversifying sources.
India shifts from Middle Eastern oil due to high prices, with IOC seeking West African crude.

news.title:
HPCL raised Power Petrol prices by Rs 2/litre; regular petrol remains unchanged.
HPCL shares, along with IOC and BPCL, saw modest gains as investors showed confidence.
news.summary:
HPCL raised Power Petrol prices by Rs 2/litre; regular petrol remains unchanged.
HPCL shares, along with IOC and BPCL, saw modest gains as investors showed confidence.

news.title:
OMC stocks rallied as HPCL, IOC, and BPCL gained up to 5% on easing crude prices.
Brokerages like HDFC Securities maintain 'Buy' ratings on OMCs despite margin pressure concerns.
news.summary:
OMC stocks rallied as HPCL, IOC, and BPCL gained up to 5% on easing crude prices.
Brokerages like HDFC Securities maintain 'Buy' ratings on OMCs despite margin pressure concerns.

news.title:
OMCs raised industrial diesel prices by 25% and premium petrol by ₹2 amid US-Iran conflict.
This marks the first significant retail fuel price hike since March 2024, with pump prices steady for ordinary fuels.
news.summary:
OMCs raised industrial diesel prices by 25% and premium petrol by ₹2 amid US-Iran conflict.
This marks the first significant retail fuel price hike since March 2024, with pump prices steady for ordinary fuels.

news.title:
Oil firms hike premium petrol prices by up to Rs 2.35/litre amid energy disruptions.
Global tensions involving US, Israel, and Iran cited as the reason for price hike.
news.summary:
Oil firms hike premium petrol prices by up to Rs 2.35/litre amid energy disruptions.
Global tensions involving US, Israel, and Iran cited as the reason for price hike.

news.title:
Indian markets crashed on Mar 19, erasing ₹13L Cr; Nifty fell 3.3% to 23,000, Sensex closed at 74,207.
HDFC Bank dropped 5%, HPCL 7%, while Jaiprakash Power Ventures surged 11.7%; crude-sensitive and auto stocks led losses.
news.summary:
Indian markets crashed on Mar 19, erasing ₹13L Cr; Nifty fell 3.3% to 23,000, Sensex closed at 74,207.
HDFC Bank dropped 5%, HPCL 7%, while Jaiprakash Power Ventures surged 11.7%; crude-sensitive and auto stocks led losses.

news.title:
PSU OMC shares fall as crude oil spikes; HPCL down 6.5%, BPCL 5.1%, IOC 3.4%.
Brent crude surged to $114 amid West Asia tensions; Nifty 50 fell 2.4% to 23,198.3.
news.summary:
PSU OMC shares fall as crude oil spikes; HPCL down 6.5%, BPCL 5.1%, IOC 3.4%.
Brent crude surged to $114 amid West Asia tensions; Nifty 50 fell 2.4% to 23,198.3.

news.title:
India's crude oil basket surged to $146/bbl, up 112% from February average of $69, pressuring OMCs like IOC, BPCL, HPCL.
OMCs face margin loss; LPG under-recovery could rise by ₹32,800 crore, necessitating price hikes or fiscal support.
news.summary:
India's crude oil basket surged to $146/bbl, up 112% from February average of $69, pressuring OMCs like IOC, BPCL, HPCL.
OMCs face margin loss; LPG under-recovery could rise by ₹32,800 crore, necessitating price hikes or fiscal support.

news.title:
India is in advanced talks with Canadian firms for LPG amid West Asia supply crunch.
Discussions involve procurement from firms like AltaGas and Pembina Pipeline.
news.summary:
India is in advanced talks with Canadian firms for LPG amid West Asia supply crunch.
Discussions involve procurement from firms like AltaGas and Pembina Pipeline.
